ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of measurement (e.g., temperature, salinity) */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Method used to collect the measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the measurement in meters */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the measurement in degrees Celsius */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "num_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES measurement_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., degrees Celsius, parts per thousand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement method (e.g., +/- 0.1 degrees Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "geographic_context" TEXT /* Geographic context of the location (e.g., ocean, sea, lake) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file (e.g., MD5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_text" TEXT /* Text contents of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the measurement */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is collaborating */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task was assigned to */,
  "task_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "task_text" TEXT /* Text of the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the project belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id")
)
